project.name: Brandmint Front UI Replacement Plan
assumptions: Fixed UI port remains 4188 with clear-and-retry policy.
Brandmint CLI (`bm launch`) remains execution backend.
Initial user entry point must be Product MD upload and wizard flow.
risks: Over-optimizing orchestration dashboard may delay user-friendly front flow.
Prompt scaffolding quality impacts extraction and wizard confidence.
Lack of real sample Product MD files may cause validation blind spots.
project.dispatch_strategy: Run sprint tasks in parallel by dispatch_lane where dependencies permit.
project.planning_intent: Docs and prompt scaffolding first, then Product-MD-first front flow, then premium visual polish and orchestration.
